properties.displayName: Debugger Evasion Indicators in Command Line or ScriptBlock
properties.description: Detect common anti-debug techniques including IsDebuggerPresent/CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent strings, anti-debug flags, or tooling checks.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "IsDebuggerPresent" or CommandLine|contains has "CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent" or CommandLine|contains has "NtQueryInformationProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "OutputDebugString") and (CommandLine|contains has "ollydbg" or CommandLine|contains has "x64dbg" or CommandLine|contains has "windbg" or CommandLine|contains has "scylla_hide" or CommandLine|contains has "procmon") and (ScriptBlockText|contains has "IsDebuggerPresent" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent")
